nasb.text: ‘Honor your father and your mother, as the Lord your God has commanded you, that your days may be prolonged and that it may go well with you on the land which the Lord your God gives you.

esv.text: “‘Honor your father and your mother, as the Lord your God commanded you, that your days may be long, and that it may go well with you in the land that the Lord your God is giving you.

cnv.text: “‘要孝敬父母，照著耶和華你的　神吩咐你的，使你可以得享長壽，也使你在耶和華你的　神賜給你的地上，得享福樂。

ccb.text: “‘要遵照你的上帝耶和华的吩咐孝敬父母，以便在你的上帝耶和华要赐给你的土地上享长寿，蒙祝福。
